species: The 11S globulin legumin typically accounts for approximately 3% of the total protein in common beans (Phaseolus vulgaris).
sample_source: Seeds of the germplasm line of common bean (P. vulgaris L., Fabaceae) SMARC1N-PN1 were harvested from the field in London, Canada.
strain: Seeds of the germplasm line of common bean (P. vulgaris L., Fabaceae) SMARC1N-PN1 were harvested from the field in London, Canada.
